Document:
# Plasma Weapons
Plasma Weapons fire superheated ionized gas that deals tremendous damage against both flesh and armor. They use [color=#a4885c]microfusion cells[/color] and are among the most powerful energy weapons available in the Wasteland.
Plasma weapons are extremely rare and are typically only found in the hands of highly advanced factions such as the Enclave or the Brotherhood of Steel.
## Plasma Pistols
Compact plasma sidearms offering high damage in a portable package.
## Plasma Rifles
Plasma rifles deal heavy damage at medium range. The plasma bolt can disintegrate lightly armored targets on a direct hit.
## Advanced Plasma Weapons
High-end plasma technology, typically pre-war military issue.
## Improvised Plasma Weapons
Post-war constructed plasma weapons, less reliable but more obtainable.
